content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom 9 (C:9):

Atom 9 (C:9) is covalently bonded to:
- Atom 8 (N:8) - nitrogen
- Atom 10 (C:10) - carbon
- Atom 14 (C:14) - carbon

These three atoms are directly connected to carbon atom 9 via covalent bonds.

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 3551, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_3551.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 9 are:
- Atom 8 (N)
- Atom 10 (C)
- Atom 14 (C)

Geomconf_index: 3551

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 9, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
